name: @agibuild/fulora-client
description: Fulora client runtime for typed app-service calls from JavaScript.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test src/middleware.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test src/integration.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test src/hmr.test.ts && node --experimental-strip-types --no-warnings --test src/worker.test.ts && npm run build && node --no-warnings --test test/profile.test.mjs && node --no-warnings --test test/ready.test.mjs

author: AGIBuild
